data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for time-off and PTO tracking.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of time-off and PTO tracking functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for this feature, there are no specific endpoints or entities referenced that would allow for validation. Therefore, the validation is blocked as there is no evidence to assert a hard requirement failure.
gaps: No evidence of time-off and PTO tracking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the time-off and PTO tracking requirement.
